Class ResourceUUIDParameterRenderer

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool.param.ResourceUUIDParameterRenderer
All Implemented Interfaces:
ParameterRenderer<Object>
public class ResourceUUIDParameterRenderer extends Object implements ParameterRenderer<Object>
A specialized parameter renderer for Resource UUIDs.

This renderer provides a sleek chip showing the Resource Name. It caches the name so it remains visible even if the resource is later unloaded from the context window.

Author:
anahata

      private JPanel createChip(String resourceUuid)

      Returns:
      a styled chip component with open action button.
